doc: Lagrange element order for the space for the main unknown, for all elements.
Path to file containing Lagrange element order for the space for the main unknown per element.
List of Lagrange element orders selected by volume and/or FE space IDs.
Lagrange element order, optionally restricted to a volume selection and/or FE space.
Volume selection ID to apply the discr_order to; -1 applies to all volumes.
FE space ID to apply the discr_order to; -1 applies to all spaces.
List of volume selection IDs to apply the discr_order to.
Volume selection ID to apply the discr_order to.
Lagrange element order for the space for the main unknown, for all elements.
